sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if the game state has changed since last inspection
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}")
print(f"Level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}")

# Check history length
print(f"History length: {len(history)}")
print(f"Transitions length: {len(transitions)}")

# Check current segmentation
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print(f"\nCurrent nodes ({len(seg)}):")
for n in seg:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"  color={n['color']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check if there's a new level or reset
if len(history) > 0:
    last_hist = history[-1]
    print(f"\nLast history action: {last_hist.action}")
    print(f"Last history frame level: {last_hist.frame.level}")
    print(f"Last history frame step: {last_hist.frame.step}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
